examples: The project aims to reforest areas that were deforested before 1990.
I intend that humans cease to deforest and reforest those regions that have been deforested.
Urban residents not only hope to reforest cities and gardens, but also clothe small area around houses and rooms with greenery.
She already has her next project in mind: to reforest areas that have been stripped by those in search of firewood.
As Mount Rubavu was deemed unsafe for urban development, it was decided to reforest the hillside and turn it into a recreational park.
